input.testCaseTitle: After login from marketing head,found exception after click on save button.Its not be working properly.
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-190 reported defect: After login from marketing head,found exception after click on save button.Its not be working properly.
input.errorMessage: After login from marketing head, found exception after click on save button. Its not be working properly.

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: Marketing Head save raised an exception, and the preserved record only confirms a later code update and successful retest. The ticket does not include the exception text or reproduction data needed for a narrower category.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.58. Hard case: role specificity makes auth-permissions possible, but the evidence is too thin for a confident permission label.
